author: mark
text:
tests: cover mixed dep+gates, claim-ready gate children, pre-gates files

Test coverage review for gates feature. Existing gates.rs had
10 tests; audit found three gaps in the required checklist:

- `bl dep tree` with a task holding both dep and gates links
- Gate children must be claim-ready (locks in "gates blocks close,
  not claim" as a test invariant, not just prose)
- A pre-0.3.0 task file (no links array) must round-trip cleanly

Added three focused integration tests. 13 total gate tests,
100% line coverage across the crate.
